privileged_info_summary: The target mobile assets (MOB-001, MOB-002, MOB-003) are synthetically generated and dynamically injected via API calls in the setup scripts. The task requires the creation of specific custom fields ('Phone Number', 'Carrier'), a fieldset ('Telecom Data'), a category ('SIM Cards'), a manufacturer ('Telecom Providers'), and a model ('5G Business SIM'). Additionally, the verifier explicitly checks that three specific SIM card assets (SIM-001, SIM-002, SIM-003) are created with exact serial numbers, phone numbers, and carrier details matching the task description, and that these SIM cards are correctly checked out directly to the corresponding 'MOB' assets.
